title: Validate Zephyr SCHC and data rows
description: Scope under project-LICHEN-2auf.59: validate recovered SCHC, SenML, and app_identity C/Zephyr slices only, using all declared native_sim/native/64 and applicable QEMU build/runtime/vector rows in a fresh clean EBS worktree. Run under AWS_PROFILE=personal in account 210337117346 and us-west-2, on an owned Project=LICHEN builder in us-west-2c with only vol-0a95eee8d1d8461eb. Record base/applied commits, binary patch SHA-256, canonical-vector provenance, west manifest, Zephyr/SDK/compiler versions, exact commands/environment/UTC timing/exit codes, logs and artifact SHA-256 values. Vector mismatch, absent row, skipped case, build-only replacement for runtime coverage, ignored exit, stale output, or dirty worktree fails closed. Do not include link_crypto or .35.6 transport/bridge gates. Copy/hash logs before sync, unmount, ownership-checked detach, wait-available, and owned-instance cleanup.
acceptance_criteria: Every declared SCHC, SenML, and app_identity host/QEMU row passes against its independent expected vectors or runtime assertions without skips or matrix reduction. Source, patch, vector, tool, command, log, and artifact provenance is complete and hashed; worktree verification passes per row; account/AZ/exact-volume checks pass; evidence collection and explicit EBS unmount, detach, wait-volume-available and ownership-checked instance termination all succeed.
close_reason: All SCHC/SenML/data rows (SCHC compression/reassembly, SenML, app_identity vectors) passed with matching test vectors, clean worktree verification, hashed artifacts. No duplicates. Matrix complete, close both per task.
